message:
test(tui): add 11 snapshot tests for header/thinking/tool toggles (bd-w4dn)

Add snapshot tests covering rendering parity features:
- Thinking visibility: hidden by config, toggled visible, status messages
- Tool output: auto-collapse for large outputs, small not collapsed,
  toggle collapse/expand, re-expand, status messages
- Header settings: quiet_startup and collapse_changelog configs
- Mixed toggles: combined thinking hidden + tools expanded

Also fixes: clippy const fn lint in interactive.rs, AgentCx type
mismatch in rpc.rs (cx → cx.cx() for 3 lock calls).

Closes bd-w4dn, bd-217r, bd-1jdk, bd-3i7u, bd-2qk.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,14 @@
+---
+source: tests/tui_snapshot.rs
+expression: view
+---
+  Pi (dummy/dummy-model)
+
+  Welcome to Pi! Type a message to begin, or /help for commands.
+
+  Enter: send  Shift+Enter: newline  Alt+Enter: multi-line  [thinking: off]
+  │ > Type a message... (/help, /exit)
+  │ >
+  │ >
+
+  Tokens: 0 in / 0 out  |  /help  |  Ctrl+C: quit
